sources.name: Mock scaffold data
sources.notes: Placeholder data for UI scaffolding only. Do not cite as empirical output.

sources.name: World Press Freedom Index
sources.notes: Planned public source for press freedom indicators.

sources.name: Uppsala Conflict Data Program
sources.notes: Planned public source for conflict indicators.

sources.name: World Development Indicators
sources.notes: Planned public source for development and economic indicators.

sources.title: Natural Earth Admin 0 Countries and Breakaway/Disputed Areas
sources.purpose: Base geometry for static map-unit rendering and disputed-area overlay.
sources.license: Public domain; review Natural Earth terms and attribution guidance before redistribution.
sources.retrieval_notes: Downloaded by scripts/geo/build-natural-earth.sh from the Natural Earth CDN. Admin 0 countries are used as de facto base boundaries; disputed/breakaway areas are rendered separately as an overlay.
sources.notes: Geometry is not political recognition and does not adjudicate sovereignty.

sources.title: Mapshaper
sources.purpose: Command-line conversion and simplification from Natural Earth shapefiles to TopoJSON.
sources.license: BSD-3-Clause; verify package license for the installed version.
sources.retrieval_notes: Run locally through npx in scripts/geo/build-natural-earth.sh.
sources.notes: Used as a build-time tool only; it is not a runtime service.
